title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
summary: A leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO sold for nearly $1 million at Sotheby's, reflecting collector interest in AI-boom memorabilia. The auction highlights how the AI industry has captured cultural and investment attention.
content: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

zh.title: Nvidia首席执行官穿过的皮夹克在苏富比拍卖会上以近百万美元的价格成交
zh.summary: Nvidia首席执行官穿过的皮夹克在苏富比以近百万美元的价格售出，反映了收藏家对AI热潮纪念品的兴趣。这次拍卖突出了AI行业如何吸引了文化和投资的关注。

title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
summary: The Trump administration is implementing controls over access to frontier AI models, centralizing decision-making power away from tech companies. This represents a significant shift in AI governance and regulatory authority.
content: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

zh.title: 白宫规定前沿AI模型访问权限，将权力从科技巨头转移，消息人士称
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在实施对前沿AI模型访问权限的控制，将决策权从科技公司集中转移。这代表了AI治理和监管权力的重大转变。

title: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
summary: Canadian wildfires are creating unhealthy air quality across the U.S., with Trump proposing to add pollution-related costs to Canadian tariffs. The air quality also threatens outdoor events including the World Cup final in New Jersey.
content: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.

zh.title: 特朗普抨击加拿大野火烟雾蔓延，称美国将把污染成本加入关税
zh.summary: 加拿大野火正在整个美国造成空气质量恶化，特朗普提议在加拿大关税中增加污染相关成本。空气质量问题也威胁到包括新泽西州世界杯决赛在内的室外活动。

title: The World Cup–winning side will make $50 million — and the IRS gets a cut
summary: The World Cup-winning team will earn $50 million in prize money, with the IRS collecting federal taxes on the winnings. The quote underscores how government taxation applies even to major sporting achievements.
content: “It doesn’t make a difference who wins the game. The IRS will get a piece.”

zh.title: 世界杯冠军队将赚取5000万美元——国税局也要获得一份
zh.summary: 世界杯冠军队将从奖金中赚取5000万美元，国税局将征收联邦税。这突显了政府税收如何适用于重大体育成就。

title: SpaceX postponed a crucial launch — and its stock went on to close below IPO price for second day
summary: SpaceX postponed a critical launch, sending shares down 4% in premarket trading and marking the second consecutive day the stock closed below its IPO price. The delay signals market concerns about the company's operations.
content: Shares in SpaceX declined about 4% in premarket trading on Friday after aborted mission.

zh.title: SpaceX推迟关键发射,股票连续第二天收盘价跌破IPO价格
zh.summary: SpaceX推迟了一次关键发射,导致股价在盘前交易中下跌4%,这是该股连续第二天收盘价跌破IPO价格。延迟表明市场对该公司运营的担忧。

title: Taco Bell says it has removed lettuce linked to cyclosporiasis outbreak from its restaurants
summary: Taco Bell removed lettuce linked to a CDC-documented cyclosporiasis outbreak from its restaurants, addressing a health safety issue. Analysts expect the company to recover quickly from the incident.
content: Taco Bell, which the CDC linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak, will likely recover soon from the health safety scare, according to analysts.

zh.title: 塔可钟表示已从餐厅移除与环孢虫病爆发相关的生菜
zh.summary: 塔可钟从餐厅移除了与CDC记录的环孢虫病爆发相关的生菜,解决了健康安全问题。分析师预计该公司将快速从该事件中恢复。

title: The average stock is having a moment as semiconductors struggle. It’s a sign of a healthy market.
summary: While semiconductor stocks struggle, average stocks are gaining, signaling healthy market diversification. This shift suggests a broad-based rally beyond concentrated AI and tech sectors.
content: It has been a good week to be average on Wall Street.

zh.title: 普通股票表现强劲,半导体股票苦苦挣扎,这是市场健康的信号
zh.summary: 虽然半导体股票苦苦挣扎,但普通股票正在上升,表明市场多元化健康。这种转变表明了超出集中AI和科技板块的广泛反弹。

title: 19 (mostly) tech stocks that have fallen at least 25% in July
summary: Nineteen mostly tech stocks have declined at least 25% in July, though seven remain triple-digit gainers for the year. The pullback reflects profit-taking after strong 2026 performance.
content: Seven of the worst performers for the month were still up by triple digits for 2026.

zh.title: 19只（主要是）科技股在7月下跌至少25%
zh.summary: 19只主要科技股在7月下跌至少25%，尽管其中七只仍在今年实现三位数涨幅。此次回调反映了在2026年强劲表现后的获利回吐。

title: How your winning stock-index fund can turn on a dime
summary: Stock-index funds can experience rapid reversals despite strong records, highlighting market volatility. The article also explores bond market shifts and housing opportunities.
content: Also in Weekend Reads: The changing bond market, housing-market opportunities and advice from the Moneyist.

zh.title: 您赢利的股票指数基金如何瞬间反转
zh.summary: 股票指数基金尽管成绩记录良好，但可能经历快速反转，突显了市场波动性。该文章还探讨了债券市场转变和住房机会。

title: Look on the bright side: Energy companies are booming
summary: Energy companies are experiencing significant growth and outperformance, suggesting investors may benefit from increasing exposure to the sector. The strong performance signals potential investment opportunities.
content: You can’t beat them. Maybe you should join them.

zh.title: 看光明的一面：能源公司蓬勃发展
zh.summary: 能源公司正在经历显著增长和超额表现，表明投资者可能受益于增加对该行业的敞口。强劲的表现标志着潜在的投资机会。

title: Chip stocks have entered a bear market. A BofA analyst says not to panic.
summary: The semiconductor sector has entered bear-market territory, but a Bank of America analyst advises against panic, noting historical third-quarter underperformance. The sector reset may be cyclical rather than fundamental.
content: The semiconductor sector is undergoing a reset and has a tendency to underperform in the third quarter.

zh.title: 芯片股票已进入熊市。美银分析师说不要惊慌。
zh.summary: 半导体行业已进入熊市区域，但美国银行分析师建议不要惊慌，并指出历史上第三季度表现不佳。该行业重置可能是周期性的，而不是基础性的。

title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
summary: Apple and Nvidia are competing for world's most valuable company status as Nvidia underperforms due to market rotation toward AI infrastructure providers. The competition reflects shifting investment priorities in the AI era.
content: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.

zh.title: 苹果和英伟达争夺全球最有价值公司的头衔
zh.summary: 由于市场轮动转向人工智能基础设施提供商，苹果和英伟达正在争夺全球最有价值公司的地位，英伟达表现不佳。这种竞争反映了人工智能时代投资重点的转变。

title: A strong start to earnings season will be put to the test next week
summary: Upcoming earnings reports from Alphabet and Tesla will test the strength of earnings season and provide direction for semiconductor stocks. These results could signal broader market momentum going forward.
content: Next week's Alphabet and Tesla earnings will give some idea of where the semis go next.

zh.title: 强劲的财报季开局将在下周接受考验
zh.summary: 来自Alphabet和特斯拉的即将发布的财报将检验财报季的强度，并为半导体股票提供方向。这些结果可能会预示更广泛的市场势头。

title: ‘I am at a loss’: My brother is dying. We are not close. What responsibility do I have to help him?
summary: A person seeks guidance on their responsibilities toward a dying brother with whom they are not close and who can no longer express his wishes. The column addresses the ethical and practical considerations families face when navigating end-of-life care decisions.
content: “He is now no longer able to think clearly or communicate his wishes.”

zh.title: "我不知所措"：我的哥哥快要去世了。我们关系不亲近。我有什么责任去帮助他？
zh.summary: 一个人寻求关于其对关系不亲近且无法表达自己意愿的垂危哥哥的责任建议。这篇专栏讨论了家庭在应对生命终末关怀决定时面临的伦理和实际考量。

title: Iraq and Syria sign agreement to restore oil pipeline that would provide alternative to Strait of Hormuz
summary: Iraq and Syria have signed an agreement to restore an oil pipeline as an alternative to the Strait of Hormuz, a strategically significant move for regional energy independence. The agreement comes as Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi visits Washington to meet with President Trump.
content: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is visiting the U.S. this week. He met with President Donald Trump at the White House on Tuesday.

zh.title: 伊拉克和叙利亚签署协议恢复油管线作为霍尔木兹海峡替代方案
zh.summary: 伊拉克和叙利亚签署协议恢复一条油管线，作为霍尔木兹海峡的替代方案，这是一次具有战略意义的地区能源独立举措。该协议是在伊拉克总理阿里·阿尔-扎伊迪访问华盛顿与特朗普总统会面之际达成的。

title: SpaceX's sagging stock 'dampens the mood' for blockbuster IPOs
summary: SpaceX's stock has fallen to approximately $126, trading 7% below its $135 IPO price, dampening investor enthusiasm for upcoming blockbuster IPOs.
content: The stock on Friday traded near $126 — about 7% below its IPO price of $135.

zh.title: SpaceX股价下跌"打击了"大型IPO的热情
zh.summary: SpaceX股价跌至约126美元，比135美元的IPO价格下跌7%，打击了投资者对即将推出的大型IPO的热情。

title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
summary: A scammer is persistently attempting to change the email address on an empty Robinhood account, raising questions about what attackers could gain from compromising dormant accounts.
content: “I’ve just been ignoring their attempts.”

zh.title: "他们很顽强"：诈骗者试图改变我空的Robinhood账户的电子邮件，他们能从中获得什么？
zh.summary: 诈骗者坚持不懈地尝试更改空Robinhood账户的电子邮件地址，这引发了关于攻击者从入侵休眠账户中能获得什么的问题。

title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
summary: A totaled 2011 Ford Fiesta with severe damage—bent hood, cracked radiator, destroyed bumper—faces a settlement decision: accept $2,000 from insurance or surrender the vehicle for $2,700.
content: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

zh.title: 我妻子的2011款福特嘉年华被报废了。我们应该接受2000美元的保险赔偿还是放弃这辆车换取2700美元？

title: Oil tankers face 'worst case scenario' in Hormuz as Iran steps up attacks on ships, maritime risk CEO says
summary: Iranian attacks on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz are intensifying, creating hazardous conditions; a recent strike on the Al Bahyah crude tanker killed one crew member and injured three.
content: One seafarer was killed and three were injured in attack on the crude oil tanker Al Bahyah off Oman's coast on Tuesday.

zh.title: 油轮在荷尔木兹海峡面临"最坏情景"，伊朗加强对船只的攻击，海事风险首席执行官表示

summary: Mortgage shoppers who neglect to compare rates across lenders often overpay substantially; shopping around could save thousands annually, with potential savings of $3,300 per year.

zh.summary: FAA已恢复波音公司对737 Max和787飞机的自我认证权限，表明监管机构对制造商的信心恢复。

title: Tesla's charts point to a decline ahead, says Carter Worth
summary: Technical analyst Carter Worth has identified bearish signals in Tesla's stock charts, suggesting a potential decline ahead for the electric vehicle maker. The analysis provides detailed technical indicators for investors monitoring Tesla's stock performance.
content: The technical analyst breaks down where he sees Tesla shares going.

title: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: China-based Moonshot AI has unveiled Kimi K3, a new large language model it claims can compete with leading American AI systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The launch reflects intensifying competition between Chinese and American companies in artificial intelligence development.
content: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.

zh.title: 中国Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可与OpenAI和Anthropic相竞争
zh.summary: 中国创业公司Moonshot AI推出了Kimi K3，这是一个新的大型语言模型，该公司声称它可以与OpenAI和Anthropic等领先的美国AI系统竞争。此次发布反映了中美两国公司在人工智能开发领域竞争的加剧。

title: Brewdog founder faces data complaints over efforts to buy back firm
summary: Brewdog founder James Watt is facing complaints to the UK data watchdog regarding his efforts to acquire majority ownership of the beer company through shareholder contact. The data protection complaints raise questions about how personal information is being handled during the acquisition process.
content: The UK data watchdog has received complaints after James Watt reportedly contacted former shareholders.

zh.title: Brewdog创始人因回购公司努力面临数据投诉
zh.summary: Brewdog创始人詹姆斯·瓦特正面临英国数据监管机构的投诉，这些投诉涉及他通过股东联系获得该啤酒公司多数股权的努力。数据保护投诉引发了人们对收购过程中如何处理个人信息的疑问。

title: Democratic socialists top MAGA candidates among voters in CNBC's All-America poll
summary: A CNBC poll shows democratic socialist candidates polling higher than MAGA-aligned candidates among voters nationwide, following successful democratic socialist primary wins including Zohran Mamdani's election as New York City mayor in 2025. The data indicates a significant shift in voter preferences within Democratic primary politics.
content: The survey's findings come as democratic socialist candidates win Democratic primaries following the 2025 election of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.

zh.title: CNBC全美民调：民主社会主义者支持率超越MAGA候选人
zh.summary: CNBC民调显示，在全国选民中，民主社会主义候选人的支持率高于MAGA阵营的候选人。此前民主社会主义者在初选中取得了成功，包括佐赫兰·曼达尼在2025年当选纽约市市长。数据表明民主党初选政治中选民偏好出现了重大转变。

title: What are your rights if you buy something that breaks?
summary: Consumer finance expert Martin Lewis provides guidance on consumer rights when purchasing defective goods, explaining why contacting the retailer should be the first step rather than going directly to the manufacturer. The advice clarifies an important but often misunderstood consumer protection principle.
content: Martin Lewis explains why you should go back to the item's retailer, not the manufacturer.

zh.title: 购买的商品损坏后你有什么权利？
zh.summary: 消费金融专家马丁·刘易斯为购买有缺陷商品时的消费者权利提供指导，解释为什么应该首先联系零售商而不是直接向制造商投诉。该建议澄清了一个重要但经常被误解的消费者保护原则。

title: California's billionaire tax: What's at risk for the biggest state economy in America
summary: California is considering implementing a billionaire tax that could generate substantial revenue in the short term, though Norway's experience with similar wealth taxes demonstrates uncertain longer-term economic consequences. The debate highlights questions about how targeting the wealthy affects overall economic growth and capital formation.
content: California's billionaire tax would generate quick revenue, but Norway's example shows the longer-term economic impact of targeting the wealthy is unclear.

zh.title: 加州亿万富翁税：美国最大州经济面临什么风险

title: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
summary: Amazon's robotaxi subsidiary Zoox has issued a software recall after one of its autonomous vehicles drove into an active emergency fire scene obscured by heavy smoke. The incident highlights ongoing safety challenges in autonomous vehicle development and real-world deployment.
content: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.

zh.title: 亚马逊Zoox在机器人出租车驶入浓烟后发布软件召回
zh.summary: 亚马逊机器人出租车子公司Zoox在其自动驾驶汽车驶入被浓烟笼罩的活跃紧急火灾现场后，发布了软件召回。这一事件凸显了自动驾驶汽车开发和实际部署中持续存在的安全挑战。

title: Why are UK fuel prices rising again?
summary: UK fuel prices are experiencing renewed increases following the breakdown of peace negotiations aimed at de-escalating the US-Israel conflict with Iran. The escalation of Middle East tensions typically drives up global energy prices, affecting British consumers and businesses.
content: UK fuel prices are going up again after the collapse of peace talks to end the US-Israel war with Iran.

zh.title: 为什么英国燃油价格再次上升？
zh.summary: 英国燃油价格在旨在缓解美以冲突与伊朗局势的和平谈判破裂后经历了新一轮上涨。中东局势紧张升级通常会推高全球能源价格，影响英国消费者和企业。

title: SpaceX stock sinks after Starship test flight aborted, pacing for a six-day losing streak
summary: SpaceX's stock plunged after aborting a Starship rocket test flight at the last second on Friday, extending a six-day losing streak. The failure raises investor concerns about the company's technical readiness and execution capabilities. This decline impacts SpaceX's market valuation as it pursues its ambitious space exploration and satellite programs.
content: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

zh.title: SpaceX股价在Starship火箭测试在最后时刻中止后暴跌，延续六日连跌
zh.summary: SpaceX在周五最后时刻中止了Starship火箭测试飞行后，股价暴跌，延续了六日连跌趋势。此次失败引发了投资者对该公司技术准备度和执行能力的担忧。这一跌势影响了SpaceX的市场估值，因为该公司正在追求其雄心勃勃的太空探索和卫星计划。

title: Netflix is paying up for costly sports rights. Is the company making the right bets?
summary: Netflix is investing heavily in live sports content to attract new subscribers, betting that sports programming is essential to long-term growth. Investors remain skeptical about whether expensive sports rights justify costs relative to engagement metrics and profitability. The strategy reflects Netflix's diversification as it faces competition from traditional sports broadcasters and other streaming platforms.
content: The streaming service says live programming helps draw in new subscribers, but investors have become disillusioned with Netflix’s broader engagement trends.

zh.title: Netflix为昂贵的体育转播权支付高价。该公司的赌注正确吗？
zh.summary: Netflix正在大力投资直播体育内容以吸引新订户，赌注在于体育节目对长期增长至关重要。投资者仍然怀疑这些昂贵的体育转播权相对于用户参与度指标和盈利能力而言是否值得成本。该战略反映了Netflix在面对传统体育转播机构和其他流媒体平台竞争时的多元化。

title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
summary: U.S. import prices rose 0.3% for the month as goods from China reached their highest costs since 2008, driven by tariffs and supply chain pressures. Energy price declines partially offset the increases, but the surge in Chinese imports signals persistent cost pressures. This development has implications for inflation, business costs, and consumer prices.
content: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

zh.title: 进口价格意外上涨，中国商品成本达到2008年以来最高
zh.summary: 美国进口价格月度上升0.3%，来自中国的商品成本达到2008年以来最高，受关税和供应链压力驱动。能源价格下降部分抵消了这些升幅，但中国进口商品的激增表明存在持续的成本压力。这一发展对通胀、商业成本和消费者价格产生了影响。

title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
summary: Iran claims U.S. military strikes hit civilian infrastructure and has expanded retaliatory attacks into Syria and Bahrain. The escalation marks a significant deterioration of the fragile U.S.-Iran truce signed last month and raises regional tensions. This geopolitical conflict could destabilize the Middle East and impact global energy markets.
content: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

zh.title: 伊朗称民用基础设施遭最新美国打击，扩大对叙利亚和巴林的攻击
zh.summary: 伊朗声称美国军事打击击中了民用基础设施，并已将报复性攻击扩大到叙利亚和巴林。这一升级标志着上月签署的脆弱美伊停战协议的显著恶化，并加剧了地区紧张局势。这场地缘政治冲突可能会破坏中东稳定并影响全球能源市场。

title: As semiconductor stocks slump, one AI-adjacent sector is thriving — and these are the stocks to buy there
summary: While semiconductor stocks face headwinds, an AI-adjacent sector is demonstrating strong performance and emerging as an attractive alternative investment. This divergence reflects the broader AI ecosystem where different segments experience different valuations and growth prospects. Investors seeking AI exposure may find better opportunities beyond traditional semiconductor makers.
content: Another way to exploit the AI evolution is available for investors.

zh.title: 半导体股票下滑，一个与人工智能相邻的行业蓬勃发展——这些是值得购买的股票
zh.summary: 虽然半导体股票面临逆风，但与人工智能相邻的行业表现强劲，成为一个有吸引力的替代投资。这种差异反映了更广泛的人工智能生态系统，其中不同部分经历不同的估值和增长前景。寻求人工智能敞口的投资者可能会在传统半导体制造商之外找到更好的机会。

title: Is SpaceX’s stock a bust because it fell below $135? Look what happened after Meta’s IPO.
summary: SpaceX's stock has declined below its $135 initial offering price, prompting questions about the company's true valuation. Historical precedent from Meta's IPO shows that nearly half of major IPOs fall below offering price and stay depressed for years. This context suggests SpaceX's decline may reflect normal market cycles rather than fundamental weaknesses.
content: Close to half of major IPOs sink below their offering price — and stay there for several years. Here’s why SpaceX is no different.

zh.title: SpaceX股票跌破135美元是失败吗？看看Meta首次公开募股后发生了什么
zh.summary: SpaceX的股价已跌至其135美元的初始发行价以下，这引发了人们对该公司真实估值的质疑。Meta首次公开募股的历史先例表明，近一半的主要首次公开募股跌至发行价以下，并在多年内保持低迷。这个背景表明SpaceX的下跌可能反映的是正常的市场周期，而不是基本面的弱点。

title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
summary: Chinese organized crime groups are conducting tap-to-pay fraud schemes that generate approximately $1 billion annually from banks and retailers. These sophisticated fraud operations exploit vulnerabilities in point-of-sale payment systems across multiple countries. The scale of theft underscores growing threats from international organized crime in the digital payments space.
content: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.

zh.title: 揭秘中国诈骗集团从银行和零售商窃取数十亿美元的手法
zh.summary: 中国有组织犯罪集团正在进行点击支付诈骗计划，每年从银行和零售商窃取约10亿美元。这些复杂的欺诈行为利用了多个国家销售点支付系统中的漏洞。这种大规模盗窃突显了国际有组织犯罪在数字支付领域日益增长的威胁。

title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
summary: A CNBC survey finds public sentiment about the economy is as pessimistic as the immediate post-pandemic period, with respondents blaming Trump administration policies. The sharp decline in economic confidence reflects concerns about inflation, interest rates, and political uncertainty. Weakening consumer sentiment could dampen spending and economic growth.
content: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

zh.title: CNBC调查发现：经济前景恶化，特朗普政策遭指责
zh.summary: CNBC调查显示，公众对经济的悲观情绪与疫情后初期相当，受访者将责任归咎于特朗普政府的政策。经济信心的急剧下降反映了对通货膨胀、利率和政治不确定性的担忧。消费者情绪的减弱可能会抑制消费支出和经济增长。

title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, SpaceX, Netflix, Apple, Tesla, Alphabet, 3M, Moody's & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant ratings and price targets on Friday for major companies including Nvidia, SpaceX, Netflix, Apple, Tesla, and Alphabet. These analyst calls provide guidance to investors and influence trading sentiment across multiple market sectors. The breadth of coverage reflects active market analysis during a volatile week.
content: Here are the biggest analyst calls on Wall Street on Friday.

zh.title: 周五主要分析师评级：英伟达、SpaceX、Netflix、Apple、Tesla、Alphabet等
zh.summary: 周五，华尔街主要分析师对英伟达、SpaceX、Netflix、Apple、Tesla和Alphabet等重点公司发布了重要评级和目标价格。这些分析师评级为投资者提供指导，并影响多个市场部门的交易情绪。广泛的覆盖范围反映了波动期间的积极市场分析。

title: Oil prices are up 13% in a week — and could head for more than $100 a barrel
summary: Oil prices surged 13% in one week, marking their largest one-week percentage gain in months, with both WTI and Brent crude approaching or potentially exceeding $100 per barrel. The rapid rally reflects supply concerns and geopolitical tensions affecting energy markets. Higher oil prices could reignite inflation pressures and increase costs for consumers and businesses.
content: West Texas Intermediate and Brent crude both saw their largest one-week percentage gains in months.

zh.title: 油价一周上涨13% — 可能升至每桶超过100美元
zh.summary: 油价在一周内飙升13%，创造了数月来最大的单周百分比涨幅，WTI和布伦特原油都接近或可能超过每桶100美元。这次迅速上涨反映了影响能源市场的供应担忧和地缘政治紧张局势。更高的油价可能会重新引发通胀压力，并增加消费者和企业的成本。

title: I racked up $35,000 in credit-card debt. Should I file for bankruptcy?
summary: A consumer facing $35,000 in credit card debt is weighing bankruptcy as a last resort while exploring alternatives like credit counseling and hardship programs. This scenario illustrates the debt spiral many consumers face with high-interest credit cards and limited repayment capacity. The inquiry highlights the importance of considering all options before pursuing bankruptcy.
content: “I’m also considering working with a credit-counseling agency or enrolling in a hardship program.”

zh.title: 我欠了35,000美元的信用卡债务。我应该申请破产吗?
zh.summary: 一位面临35,000美元信用卡债务的消费者正在权衡申请破产作为最后手段，同时探索信用咨询和困难援助计划等替代方案。这个场景说明了许多消费者面临的高利息信用卡债务螺旋和还款能力有限的问题。这个问题凸显了在申请破产前考虑所有选择的重要性。

title: Lettuce at Taco Bell in five states confirmed as source of a diarrhea-causing parasite outbreak
summary: The CDC confirmed that shredded iceberg lettuce from Taco Bell restaurants in five Midwest states (Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Ohio, West Virginia) is the source of a parasite outbreak causing diarrhea. Health authorities are advising consumers to avoid the contaminated product as investigations continue. This incident highlights food safety vulnerabilities in major restaurant chains' supply chains.
content: The CDC warned consumers not to eat shredded iceberg lettuce from Yum Brands' Taco Bell restaurants in Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Ohio and West Virginia.

zh.title: 塔可钟五州的生菜确认为导致腹泻的寄生虫爆发的源头
zh.summary: 美国疾病控制和预防中心证实，来自五个中西部州（印第安纳州、肯塔基州、密歇根州、俄亥俄州、西弗吉尼亚州）塔可钟餐厅的切碎冰山生菜是导致腹泻的寄生虫爆发的源头。卫生当局建议消费者在调查继续进行期间避免食用受污染的产品。这起事件凸显了大型餐饮连锁店供应链中的食品安全漏洞。

title: Homebuyer affordability slipped for fifth straight month, real estate index shows
summary: Housing affordability has declined for the fifth consecutive month as both home prices and mortgage rates continue climbing in 2026. The deteriorating affordability index suggests the housing market may face headwinds as fewer buyers can qualify for mortgages. This trend could slow home sales and pressure real estate market growth.
content: With both home prices and mortgage rates climbing since earlier this year, affording a home has become harder, according to a housing affordability index.

zh.title: 购房承受能力连续第五个月下滑，房地产指数显示
zh.summary: 随着房价和抵押贷款利率在2026年继续攀升，住房可负担性已连续第五个月下降。不断恶化的可负担性指数表明，随着符合抵押贷款资格的买家减少，房地产市场可能面临逆风。这一趋势可能会放缓住房销售，对房地产市场增长造成压力。

title: How big is the great wealth transfer? It could be over $100 trillion or $36 trillion
summary: Two new studies estimate the coming intergenerational wealth transfer at vastly different scales—between $36 trillion and over $100 trillion—creating significant uncertainty about economic impact. The wide discrepancy highlights methodological challenges in projecting wealth distribution across generations. Policymakers and investors need clarity on the true scale to plan accordingly.
content: Two studies have raised new questions about the size and impact of the coming great wealth transfer.

zh.title: 大财富转移规模有多大？可能超过100万亿美元或36万亿美元
zh.summary: 两项新研究对即将到来的代际财富转移进行了估计，但规模差异巨大——在36万亿美元至100多万亿美元之间——造成了对经济影响的重大不确定性。这种巨大的差异突显了在预测代际间财富分布时的方法论挑战。决策者和投资者需要了解真实规模以便相应规划。

title: Airbnb co-founder says his X account was hacked as he deletes comments about tokenization
summary: Airbnb CEO claims his X account was compromised by hackers and has deleted posts about cryptocurrency tokenization that appeared without authorization. The incident raises questions about account security and the veracity of statements made before the deletion. This cybersecurity breach could impact investor confidence in the company's technology governance.
content: Airbnb founder and CEO has deleted comments about tokenization that were posted to his account.

zh.title: Airbnb首席执行官声称其X账户遭黑客入侵，删除代币化相关评论
zh.summary: Airbnb首席执行官声称其X账户被黑客入侵，并删除了未经授权发布的有关加密货币代币化的帖子。这一事件引发了对账户安全性和删除前所作声明真实性的质疑。这一网络安全漏洞可能会影响投资者对该公司技术治理的信心。

title: Obscure volatility measure points to a 'Magnificent Seven’ earnings breakout
summary: A little-known volatility measure indicates that the Magnificent Seven technology stocks may be poised for an earnings breakout and market gains. The indicator provides insights for investors monitoring the market's dependence on mega-cap technology performance for overall market strength.
content: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.

zh.title: 不起眼的波动率指标预示"美国七大科技股"盈利突破
zh.summary: 一个鲜为人知的波动率指标表明,美国七大科技股可能即将迎来盈利突破和市场上升。该指标为投资者提供了关于市场对大型科技公司表现依赖程度的洞察,有助于监测整体市场强度。

title: Why has British Steel been nationalised?
summary: The UK government has taken Britain's only remaining virgin steel production plant into public ownership through nationalization, following years of uncertainty about the facility's viability. The move reflects government commitment to maintaining domestic steel production capacity and protecting a strategic industry.
content: The UK's only remaining plant making virgin steel has been taken into public ownership after years of uncertainty over its future.

zh.title: 英国钢铁为何被国有化?
zh.summary: 英国政府已将该国仅存的原生钢铁生产设施收归公共所有权,此前多年来该设施的生存能力一直存在不确定性。此举反映了政府维持国内钢铁生产能力和保护战略产业的承诺。

title: Who is the frontrunner to be the UK's next chancellor?
summary: Andy Burnham is taking office as UK Prime Minister and moving into 10 Downing Street next week, creating a vacancy for Chancellor of the Exchequer at Number 11. Political observers are speculating on potential candidates to fill this central role in UK economic policy.
content: Andy Burnham will be moving into Downing Street next week, and a question remains over who will be his neighbour in Number 11.

zh.title: 谁是英国下一任财政大臣的领跑者?
zh.summary: 安迪·伯纳姆将于下周就任英国首相并入驻唐宁街10号,这将使财政大臣职位出现空缺。政治观察家正在猜测谁将担任这一英国经济政策关键角色。

title: BP, ConocoPhillips to back Iraq with major investments as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
summary: BP and ConocoPhillips are announcing major investments in Iraq as part of broader U.S. efforts to reduce Iran's regional energy influence. The development reflects geopolitical competition and shifting energy market dynamics in the Middle East.
content: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

zh.title: 英美石油公司支持伊拉克，美国试图削弱伊朗的能源影响力
zh.summary: 英国石油公司和康菲石油公司宣布对伊拉克进行大规模投资，作为美国更广泛努力的一部分，以减少伊朗的地区能源影响力。这一发展反映了地缘政治竞争和中东能源市场动态的变化。

title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
summary: China has criticized the UK government's decision to nationalize British Steel, which the government justified as protecting a vital national capability. The dispute underscores ongoing trade tensions between the two nations.
content: The UK government said taking the firm into public hands would safeguard "a vital national capability".

zh.title: 中国批评英国钢铁国有化
zh.summary: 中国批评了英国政府收购英国钢铁公司的决定，政府将此举描述为保护一项重要的国家能力。这场争议突显了两国之间持续的贸易紧张关系。

title: Sweden's Saab posts record orders as fighter jet maker cashes in on higher defense spending
summary: Swedish defense contractor Saab has achieved record order levels as European governments increase military spending in response to regional security concerns. The surge demonstrates how geopolitical tensions are driving defense procurement across the continent.
content: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

zh.title: 瑞典萨博公司创记录订单，战斗机制造商从更高的国防支出中获益
zh.summary: 瑞典国防承包商萨博公司实现了创纪录的订单水平，因为欧洲各国政府增加了对地区安全问题的军事支出。这一激增表明地缘政治紧张局势正在推动整个欧洲的国防采购。

title: 'Volunteering with food charity saved me from loneliness'
summary: FoodCycle, a food charity, converts surplus food into meals for communities, with volunteers reporting the work combats social isolation and loneliness. The organization demonstrates how food rescue initiatives can address both waste and mental health concerns.
content: FoodCycle takes surplus food and turns it into three-course meals served to the community.

zh.title: 与食物慈善组织志愿服务救我脱离孤独
zh.summary: FoodCycle是一家食物慈善机构，将剩余食物转化为社区餐食，志愿者表示这项工作能够对抗社会隔离和孤独感。该组织展示了食物救援倡议如何能够同时解决浪费和心理健康问题。

title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
summary: China's Xi Jinping is positioning the country as an AI partner for developing nations, offering 5,000 training opportunities and cooperation programs. The initiative aims to expand China's influence in global AI development while emphasizing safeguards against security risks.
content: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

zh.title: 习近平向发展中国家推介中国作为人工智能伙伴，警告风险和安全过度延伸
zh.summary: 中国领导人习近平正在将中国定位为发展中国家的人工智能伙伴，提供5000个培训机会和合作计划。该倡议旨在扩大中国在全球人工智能发展中的影响力，同时强调对安全风险的保护措施。

title: How do you split the bill with friends?
summary: The article explores the social dynamics and practical challenges of splitting restaurant bills among friends, a common source of tension in social dining. It examines various approaches to addressing this widespread etiquette dilemma.
content: Hands down the worst part of going out for dinner.

zh.title: 你如何与朋友分摊账单？
zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了与朋友分摊餐厅账单的社交动态和实际挑战，这是社交就餐中的常见紧张来源。它考查了解决这一普遍礼仪困境的各种方法。

title: Burnham's 'Manchesterism' got him to No 10 - but will it work for the UK?
summary: BBC's economics editor examines whether Manchester's successful regional development model, which elevated Andy Burnham to high office, can serve as a template for UK-wide economic policy. The analysis considers the broader applicability of regional-focused strategies.
content: Economics editor Faisal Islam examines whether the north-west city can be a template for the entire country.

zh.title: 伯翰的'曼彻斯特主义'让他成为首相——但这对英国有效吗?
zh.summary: BBC经济编辑分析曼彻斯特成功的区域发展模式(该模式将安迪·伯翰推向高位)是否能成为英国范围内经济政策的模板。分析考虑了地区重点战略的更广泛适用性。

title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
summary: India's largest asset manager IPO attracted $31 billion in bids, predominantly from institutional investors, demonstrating strong confidence in Indian equities. The massive response reflects investor appetite for exposure to India's growing financial sector.
content: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

zh.title: 印度今年最大IPO获得310亿美元出价,由机构投资者热情驱动
zh.summary: 印度最大资产管理公司IPO吸引了310亿美元的出价,主要来自机构投资者,表明对印度股票的强烈信心。这一巨大反应反映了投资者对印度日益增长的金融部门的兴趣。

title: SoftBank sinks over 9% as Asia chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
summary: Japanese AI-linked stocks, including SoftBank, declined sharply as a U.S. semiconductor rout spread across Asia. The sell-off followed Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's disappointing outlook, which failed to restore investor confidence in the sector.
content: Japanese AI-linked stocks tumbled as a fresh rout in U.S. semiconductor shares spread across Asia after Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's outlook failed to reassure investors.

zh.title: 软银下跌超9% 亚洲芯片股跟跌华尔街AI抛售
zh.summary: 随着美国半导体下滑蔓延到亚洲，包括软银在内的日本AI相关股票大幅下跌。此次抛售源于台积电令人失望的前景指引，未能恢复投资者对该行业的信心。

title: Stock futures slip as major averages head for losing week; Netflix tumbles after earnings: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures slipped as chipmaker declines dragged the broader market lower, putting major averages on track for a losing week. Netflix shares fell following earnings results.
content: The moves come after a decline in chipmakers dragged the broader market lower.

zh.title: 股指期货下滑 主要指数走向亏损周 Netflix财报后大幅下跌：实时更新
zh.summary: 芯片制造商下跌拖累了更广泛的市场，美国股指期货下滑，主要指数即将迎来亏损周。Netflix股票在财报公布后下跌。

title: Oil rises as Iran threatens retaliation if Trump targets country's critical infrastructure
summary: Oil prices increased as geopolitical tensions between the United States and Iran escalated, with Iran threatening retaliation if U.S. critical infrastructure is targeted. The threat raised investor concerns about potential supply disruptions.
content: Oil prices rose Friday as investors weighed escalating threats between the United States and Iran.

zh.title: 油价上升 伊朗威胁如特朗普针对该国关键基础设施将进行报复
zh.summary: 随着美国和伊朗之间的地缘政治紧张局势升级，油价上升。伊朗威胁如果美国关键基础设施成为目标，将进行报复。这一威胁引发了投资者对潜在供应中断的担忧。

title: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
summary: Trump Media is launching a premium paid service offering early access to key social posts for Wall Street traders. The move targets investors seeking trading advantages from influential posts.
content: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.

zh.title: 特朗普媒体出售关键社交帖子的提前访问权
zh.summary: 特朗普媒体正在推出一项高级付费服务，为华尔街交易员提供关键社交帖子的提前访问权。此举针对寻求从有影响力帖子中获取交易优势的投资者。

title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
summary: Elon Musk's data center projects in Memphis, including Colossus, have become the focal point of a nationwide backlash against AI data centers. The controversy involves policy proposals, protests, and legal challenges citing the project as a cautionary example.
content: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的孟菲斯人工智能帝国成为数据中心反弹的震中
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克在孟菲斯的数据中心项目（包括Colossus）已成为全国反对人工智能数据中心浪潮的焦点。争议涉及政策提议、抗议和法律诉讼，将该项目作为警示案例。

title: Seven & i shares jump 4% on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
summary: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. surged 4% following reports of potential stake acquisition talks with Poland's Zabka Group convenience chain. The news suggests a possible strategic expansion into the European market.
content: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped 4% after a Nikkei report flagged stake talks with Poland's Zabka Group.

zh.title: 七便利店股价因与波兰连锁企业Zabka的股权谈判报道上涨4%
zh.summary: 七便利店控股公司股价在潜在的与波兰便利店连锁企业Zabka集团的股权收购谈判报道后上涨4%。这一消息暗示可能向欧洲市场进行战略扩展。

title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
summary: SpaceX aborted a Starship test flight, causing its stock to decline, though Elon Musk indicated another attempt would be made within days. The company has already completed one successful maiden flight of the Starship V3 rocket in May.
content: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.

zh.title: SpaceX中止星舰测试飞行，导致股价下跌
zh.summary: SpaceX中止了星舰测试飞行，导致股价下跌，但埃隆·马斯克表示公司将在数天内再次尝试。该公司已在5月成功完成了星舰V3火箭的首次飞行。

title: Netflix is getting stingier about its viewing data, and Wall Street isn’t happy
summary: Netflix's stock declined following mixed earnings results and the company's announcement that it will reduce publication of viewing data reports. Wall Street investors reacted negatively to the reduced transparency on viewing metrics.
content: Netflix’s stock is falling in the wake of mixed earnings and a new plan to cut back on the publication of ‘What We Watched’ reports.

zh.title: Netflix对观看数据更加保守，华尔街不满
zh.summary: Netflix在混合财报结果和宣布将减少发布观看数据报告后，股票下跌。华尔街投资者对观看指标透明度的降低做出了负面反应。

title: 10 U.S. metro areas where builders are slashing prices on new homes
summary: While existing-home prices reached record highs, new home builders in multiple U.S. metro areas are slashing prices to move inventory. The price cuts highlight diverging market dynamics between existing and newly constructed homes.
content: Existing-home prices just hit a new record high — but there are plenty of newly built homes selling at a discount, as desperate builders cut prices.

zh.title: 美国10个大都市地区建筑商大幅降低新房价格
zh.summary: 尽管现有房屋价格创历史新高，但美国多个大都市地区的新房建筑商正在大幅降价以清空库存。降价凸显了现有房屋和新建房屋之间的市场动态差异。
